name: Team Gillibrand
subject: Let us explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand 2020
body:
Tomorrow is Deadline Day for the DNC's debate stage qualifications.

| | [](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=MjIwMTEwMDcS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTU2MTYxNzY1NgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
|
---
| Peter, tomorrow will be the most important day for our campaign so far. We'll explain why in just a minute, but first, [**can you make a donation right now to our campaign? Every gift gets us closer to sending Kirsten to the debate.**](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjIwMTEwMDcS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTU2MTYxNzY1NgS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Tomorrow is Deadline Day for the DNC's debate stage qualifications. After tomorrow, they'll look at how many donors each campaign has and see who gets to go to the September debate in Houston.

We need to hit 130,000 donors before midnight tomorrow to help secure Kirsten's spot, and we're still just a bit short.

**We 've long been an underdog campaign--discounted, doubted, and dismissed.** But Kirsten has never stopped fighting for what's right, even when it's hard, and _especially_ when it's hard.

Because she takes on the fights we can't afford to lose, from guaranteeing reproductive freedom to getting money out of politics to protecting our planet.

**Now, we need to prove the naysayers wrong yet again.**

Just over 24 hours to go, Peter.

---
Make a donation right now in these last few hours before the DNC deadline tomorrow at midnight:
| If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
---
| | [Donate $1](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjIwMTEwMDcS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTU2MTYxNzY1NgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
| | [Donate $5](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjIwMTEwMDcS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTU2MTYxNzY1NgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

| | [Donate $25](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjIwMTEwMDcS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTU2MTYxNzY1NgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
| | [Other](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjIwMTEwMDcS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTU2MTYxNzY1NgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

| Thanks,

Team Gillibrand
---

| | [DONATE NOW](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjIwMTEwMDcS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTU2MTYxNzY1NgS2&mt=1&rt=0)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If your inbox is overcrowded, you can sign up to receive less email [here](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjIwMTEwMDcS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTU2MTYxNzY1NgS2&mt=1&rt=0). We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving messages from Kirsten altogether, [click here to unsubscribe](https://www.pages05.net/gfppcinc/unsubscribe/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=22011007&spUserID=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&spJobID=MTU2MTYxNzY1NgS2&spReportId=MTU2MTYxNzY1NgS2). Did a friend forward you this message? Sign up to become a member of Team Gillibrand and receive emails yourself [here](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjIwMTEwMDcS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTU2MTYxNzY1NgS2&mt=1&rt=0).

Stay up to date with our campaign by following Kirsten on social media:
[**Facebook**](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjIwMTEwMDcS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTU2MTYxNzY1NgS2&mt=1&rt=0) | [**Twitter**](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjIwMTEwMDcS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTU2MTYxNzY1NgS2&mt=1&rt=0) | [**Instagram**](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=24&ms=MjIwMTEwMDcS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTU2MTYxNzY1NgS2&mt=1&rt=0) | [**Snapchat**](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=23&ms=MjIwMTEwMDcS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTU2MTYxNzY1NgS2&mt=1&rt=0) | [**Medium**](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjIwMTEwMDcS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTU2MTYxNzY1NgS2&mt=1&rt=0)

To contribute via check, please mail it to _Gillibrand 2020, PO Box 1590, Troy, NY 12181_. Thank you so much for your support! Text BRAVE to 60980 or click [here](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=20&ms=MjIwMTEwMDcS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTU2MTYxNzY1NgS2&mt=1&rt=0) to sign up to receive text messages from our team. Click [here](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjIwMTEwMDcS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTU2MTYxNzY1NgS2&mt=1&rt=0) to sign up to volunteer with our team. Thanks for reading all the way to the end! [We salute you.](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjIwMTEwMDcS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTU2MTYxNzY1NgS2&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Here's how we take back the Senate, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
[**These races are critical to winning a Democratic Senate in 2020. Contribute $5 to support Theresa Greenfield, Amy McGrath, and Gary Peters right now.**](http://action.dickdurbin.?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-senate-slate-august-2019?refcode=em190827&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Peter,
Taking back the White House isn't our only mission in 2020. We are in the fight of our lives to stop Mitch McConnell's era of obstruction and reclaim a Democratic majority in the Senate.
The only way we'll do that is if we defend every Democratic Senator on the ballot, like Gary Peters in Michigan, while electing new Democrats, like Theresa Greenfield in Iowa and Amy McGrath in Kentucky.
[**Gary, Theresa, and Amy need our support to win. Pitch in $5 to their campaigns now.**](http://action.dickdurbin.?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-senate-slate-august-2019?refcode=em190827&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Gary Peters is a Democratic champion who isn't afraid to stand up to the extreme Trump-GOP agenda and fight back on behalf of Michigan's families. He is a top target for the Republicans in 2020, so we must do everything we can to ensure they don't defeat him in the next election.
In Iowa, Theresa Greenfield is running to unseat a Republican who time and again fails to fight for the people of her state in the Senate. Iowans--and all Americans--deserve Senators who are on their side. It's going to be an uphill climb, but I know Theresa can win with our support.
And not only does the 2020 election give us an opportunity to remove Mitch McConnell as Majority Leader, Kentucky can remove him from the Senate and elect Amy McGrath. Amy is running because Mitch has turned his back on Kentucky and people all over the country.
[**Let 's show the Republicans that we are ready to defeat them and reclaim the Senate in 2020. Contribute $5 to support Amy, Theresa, and Gary's campaigns right now.**](http://action.dickdurbin.?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-senate-slate-august-2019?refcode=em190827&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
My best,
Dick Durbin
**[CONTRIBUTE](http://action.dickdurbin.?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-senate-slate-august-2019?refcode=em190827&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

* * *
Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Should you want to unsubscribe, you can [click here](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4cdd/42ab3cf4/616891fd/135d7cd2/2493197664/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Join Senator Durbin in taking on powerful special interests on behalf of hard-working middle class families by [making a contribution to our campaign here.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4cdd/42ab3cf4/616891fd/135d7cd3/2493197664/VEsA/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/durbin_footer")
Friends of Dick Durbin
Attn: Online Department
101 W. Grand, Suite 200
Chicago, IL 60654

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Are you still with me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
I can’t do this without you. |

| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=cbb40cd79e53c998e0816ab31915d551403e658f398fc188eee7c267b19cec1f10eb754098e5b8529ea2f3943d72621cfa2b7f79c5586491)

Friend,

The 2020 Democrats are floundering. **They heard we raised a RECORD BREAKING $105 MILLION in the second quarter, and their weakest links are dropping like flies.**

---
| They can't handle the fact that _AMERICA is REJECTING their CORRUPT agendas,_ and instead of working HARDER, they're spewing LIES about me and spreading the personal information of our supporters.

Our _August End-of-Month fundraising deadline_ is coming up and I want to raise $2,000,000 by August 31st at 11:59 PM to finish the month STRONG. Your FIRST contribution is so important that I've activated a **TRIPLE-MATCH** just for**YOU.**

name: Nick Meier
subject: ICYMI: “Top 18 opportunity for Dems in 2020”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elisa Cardnell for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9435930/93158911/979390018?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTQzZjZjMi05M2M5LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LK10yDRKQSklIJVXlcdMA8j_F5UfD8W4-sHI4bq3Hm8=)
Hey Peter,
Summer is winding down, but this race is heating up. We are just days away from the end of August, and we have some exciting updates to share.
In case you missed it, **Rachel Bitecofer, a political scientist at CNU,[rated TX-02](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9435933/93158912/-1751489475?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTQzZjZjMi05M2M5LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LK10yDRKQSklIJVXlcdMA8j_F5UfD8W4-sHI4bq3Hm8=) as one most competitive seats of the 2020 cycle.** This ranking puts it above Red to Blue races in targeted states like Michigan, Kentucky, and New York.
Earlier this summer, the [Texas Tribune rated this race as highly competitive](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9435935/93158916/1107650780?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTQzZjZjMi05M2M5LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LK10yDRKQSklIJVXlcdMA8j_F5UfD8W4-sHI4bq3Hm8=). We are poised to flip in 2020. With so much at stake, and with the demographic trends on our side, we need folks like you to help push our grassroots efforts forward.

name: Berrett Gall
subject: You see this?
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
Hi, Did you see this recent report? I've never seen a Republican Presidential candidate target Minnesota like this before, especially not this early. The Trump campaign now has as many as 14 full-time staffers on the ground here actively recruiting volunteers across the state. The more they do (and the more money they spend), the more the right-wing GOP candidates down-ballot benefit. **[AXIOS: Trump campaign "aggressively" targeting Minnesota](https://act.myngp.com/el/CwPR9-8Ix2qgc9QfJEcWNbxRsJyczgqwTrx3aZzv6oI=/xNwUbJbjTo9Auv1Ho2u1Vv7tV-nhi0orWUDFPpYPNHw=?refcode=body&amount=25)** Hi, Did you see this recent report? I've never seen a Republican Presidential candidate target Minnesota like this before, especially not this early. The Trump campaign now has as many as 14 full-time staffers on the ground here actively recruiting volunteers across the state. The more they do (and the more money they spend), the more the right-wing GOP candidates down-ballot benefit. **This is a big problem for us.** Next year is our _only_ guaranteed shot at taking back the Minnesota Senate from the Republicans who are blocking common-sense gun reform, emergency insulin for all, paid family leave, and more. Governor Walz would never sit on the sidelines at a time like this. And that's why we're laying early groundwork of our own -- we just need to maintain our budget targets to see our plans through. **[Will you donate $5 or more by Saturday to help us hit our $10,000 goal for August so we can support our allies and keep Minnesota blue next year?](https://act.myngp.com/el/CwPR9-8Ix2qgc9QfJEcWNbxRsJyczgqwTrx3aZzv6oI=/xNwUbJbjTo9Auv1Ho2u1Vv7tV-nhi0orWUDFPpYPNHw=?refcode=body&amount=25.00)** We built one of the most successful campaigns in the history of our state in 2018. Our shared vision for One Minnesota is incredibly powerful. If we're able to build on our progress and continue connecting with people, there's no way Trump's chaotic, hateful, divisive message prevails next year. We're well on our way, but we need to keep our budget on track to fund our efforts to reach out to voters, organize and hold regular community meetings across the state, and help down ballot DFL candidates. **[We're counting on you. Please make a contribution that works for you so we can finish August strong.](https://act.myngp.com/el/CwPR9-8Ix2qgc9QfJEcWNbxRsJyczgqwTrx3aZzv6oI=/xNwUbJbjTo9Auv1Ho2u1Vv7tV-nhi0orWUDFPpYPNHw=?refcode=body&amount=25.00)** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ ****[Express Donate: $25](https://act.myngp.com/el/CwPR9-8Ix2qgc9QfJEcWNbxRsJyczgqwTrx3aZzv6oI=/xNwUbJbjTo9Auv1Ho2u1Vv7tV-nhi0orWUDFPpYPNHw=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=_25-d)**** ****[Express Donate: $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/CwPR9-8Ix2qgc9QfJEcWNbxRsJyczgqwTrx3aZzv6oI=/xNwUbJbjTo9Auv1Ho2u1Vv7tV-nhi0orWUDFPpYPNHw=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=_50-d)**** ****[Express Donate: $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/CwPR9-8Ix2qgc9QfJEcWNbxRsJyczgqwTrx3aZzv6oI=/xNwUbJbjTo9Auv1Ho2u1Vv7tV-nhi0orWUDFPpYPNHw=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=_100-d)**** ****[Express Donate: $250](https://act.myngp.com/el/CwPR9-8Ix2qgc9QfJEcWNbxRsJyczgqwTrx3aZzv6oI=/xNwUbJbjTo9Auv1Ho2u1Vv7tV-nhi0orWUDFPpYPNHw=?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=_250-d)**** ****[Or, donate another amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/CwPR9-8Ix2qgc9QfJEcWNbxRsJyczgqwTrx3aZzv6oI=/xNwUbJbjTo9Auv1Ho2u1Vv7tV-nhi0orWUDFPpYPNHw=?refcode=_other-d)**** Thank you, Berrett Gall | | ********[**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/CwPR9-8Ix2qgc9QfJEcWNbxRsJyczgqwTrx3aZzv6oI=/xNwUbJbjTo9Auv1Ho2u1Vv7tV-nhi0orWUDFPpYPNHw=?refcode=button-p&amount=25)********

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9438545/93187841/683764388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmM3OGVlMC05Y2M5LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_6f01WX8LCqqr_pUX-CrfX-Tym9RAzgQovcdV52JmJc=)

Peter, Trump and McCaul have added over $4 trillion dollars to the national debt, including a $1.8 trillion dollar tax cut for the wealthiest Americans. Not all debt is bad debt — but this is plain ol’ bad debt. Instead of investing in infrastructure, healthcare, housing, childcare, or cancelling college debt, Trump has done everything he could to put more money into the pockets of the 1%. This has all been at the expense of the working families who live paycheck to paycheck.

We need to stand up for what is right. We cannot sign off on huge tax giveaways at the expense of everyday Americans. [**Help send me to Washington so we can undo the damage that has been done.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9438546/93187844/203122784?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmM3OGVlMC05Y2M5LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_6f01WX8LCqqr_pUX-CrfX-Tym9RAzgQovcdV52JmJc=&refcode=em082719&recurring=1)

According to Yahoo Finance, “This will mark the third time that a major piece of deficit-financed legislation will get Trump’s stamp of approval.” The biggest tab Trump has racked up was his tax giveaway to rich friends and campaign donors. This is exactly the swamp that Donald Trump said he was going to drain — but of course that hasn’t happened.

I am running for Congress to fight for working families, not to give our public resources to the wealthy elite. [**Can you donate $18 today so I can vote to reverse the $1.8 trillion tax giveaway?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9438549/93187847/203122784?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmM3OGVlMC05Y2M5LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_6f01WX8LCqqr_pUX-CrfX-Tym9RAzgQovcdV52JmJc=&refcode=em082719&amount=18&recurring=1) For the people,

clean_body: = Peter, Trump and McCaul have added over $4 trillion dollars to the national debt, including a $1.8 trillion dollar tax cut for the wealthiest Americans. Not all debt is bad debt — but this is plain ol’ bad debt. Instead of investing in infrastructure, healthcare, housing, childcare, or cancelling college debt, Trump has done everything he could to put more money into the pockets of the 1%. This has all been at the expense of the working families who live paycheck to paycheck. We need to stand up for what is right. We cannot sign off on huge tax giveaways at the expense of everyday Americans. According to Yahoo Finance, “This will mark the third time that a major piece of deficit-financed legislation will get Trump’s stamp of approval.” The biggest tab Trump has racked up was his tax giveaway to rich friends and campaign donors. This is exactly the swamp that Donald Trump said he was going to drain — but of course that hasn’t happened. I am running for Congress to fight for working families, not to give our public resources to the wealthy elite. name: Margaret Good
subject: I’m so excited to have you on this team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Margaret Good for Congress
body:
Let me start by saying thank you for joining our team! I'm so excited you've joined our grassroots campaign -- your support in our ultra-competitive race is crucial to flipping Florida's 16th district and electing real representation for Southwest Florida. | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/mt4eh4WeBvgCA0NEPJynIJeeF2tfxUMxEtpDwQUrtmI=/ypC98gvhJI2jsXHpqmUw8lRKMDToTdkIbSDw8fOcTNM=)
Hi there,

Let me start by saying thank you for joining our team! I'm so excited you've joined our grassroots campaign -- your support in our ultra-competitive race is crucial to flipping Florida's 16th district and electing real representation for Southwest Florida.

Growing up the daughter of a priest and a nurse, I learned from a young age the importance of helping those around us and lending a hand when our neighbors are struggling. When a seat in the Florida Legislature opened up last year, I knew it was an opportunity to make a real difference in our community through public service.

What happened next was incredible: We united thousands of folks across Southwest Florida and built a coalition strong enough to win a special election in a deep-red district. It's time to come together again, put aside our differences, and fight for our common goals and for the common good. **We need you to join us today.**

For more than a decade, Congressman Buchanan has neglected Southwest Florida values and pushed our priorities aside to cater to the interests of Washington insiders. As our challenges have grown deeper and more complex, he continues to turn a blind eye to the real issues hurting our region and takes the easy way out.

**We can do so much more, and we deserve so much better. That 's why I'm running, and why I'm so glad to have you by my side in this fight.**

**[I'm ready to roll up my sleeves and get to work for FL-16, but this is going to be one of the most competitive races in the country. I need your support if we're going to flip this seat and bring lasting change to our region.](https://act.myngp.com/el/mt4eh4WeBvgCA0NEPJynIJeeF2tfxUMxEtpDwQUrtmI=/FGL8RoC1bGd7EEaTvbwmBMrp-cr8GJAS_8MzxtRCc6I=?refcode=em_ws_2019_mg_pt1_optin&amount=25&recurring=auto)**

| [CONTRIBUTE $15 »](https://act.myngp.com/el/mt4eh4WeBvgCA0NEPJynIJeeF2tfxUMxEtpDwQUrtmI=/FGL8RoC1bGd7EEaTvbwmBMrp-cr8GJAS_8MzxtRCc6I=?refcode=em_ws_2019_mg_pt1_optin&amount=15&recurring=auto)
---
[Or, a custom donation »](https://act.myngp.com/el/mt4eh4WeBvgCA0NEPJynIJeeF2tfxUMxEtpDwQUrtmI=/FGL8RoC1bGd7EEaTvbwmBMrp-cr8GJAS_8MzxtRCc6I=?refcode=em_ws_2019_mg_pt1_optin&amount=35&recurring=auto)

The pundits have doubted us before, but we proved them wrong by working harder than our representative ever did. With you on this team, I know we can send shockwaves across the nation again and send Southwest Florida's values to Washington.

Welcome aboard, friends. Now, let's get to work!

With gratitude,

_Margaret_

P.S. If you can't chip in today, you can still support our campaign by following our fight on [**Facebook**](https://act.myngp.com/el/mt4eh4WeBvgCA0NEPJynIJeeF2tfxUMxEtpDwQUrtmI=/sRm8iPGvClwLAw1i97LDznoYo5VrDNXJKb7N5UnJYuc=) and **[Twitter](https://act.myngp.com/el/mt4eh4WeBvgCA0NEPJynIJeeF2tfxUMxEtpDwQUrtmI=/oUabb4nAbXD02n4DuFkmWg4vK6IAQ1KhEDOdk7ja89U=?lang=en)**!

Paid for by Margaret Good for Congress

name: Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak
subject: Speaking truth to power at the DNC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
Peter,
Last night, local Iowa television showcased my recent speech before Democratic National Committee (DNC) delegates this past week.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9439905/93194056/-189614204?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmQ4ODQ1ZS1hNGM5LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2GCUR72PsFYo3X27AOdY9YqCGkVgJoE2s2yHnJ9hbEc=)
"**He may be the most accomplished presidential candidate...**" George Mallet of KIMT told Iowans last night. "Joe Sestak is making his way through Iowa...he represent[ed] Pennsylvania's 7th congressional district... serv[ing] for 31 years in the US Navy, graduating second in his class from the United States Naval Academy... achiev[ing] the rank of three star Admiral, making him the highest-ranking military officer ever elected to Congress at the time of his election."
[**Contribute**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9439906/93194057/723115086?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmQ4ODQ1ZS1hNGM5LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2GCUR72PsFYo3X27AOdY9YqCGkVgJoE2s2yHnJ9hbEc=&refcode=em0828kimt)
**Pointing out that I am running on accountability** \-- in answering for oneself, not for one's intentions but for one's deeds -- KIMT noted one of the examples I gave to the DNC: “**Sestak has little tolerance for politicians in either party who voted for the war in Iraq** , saying, '**I never forgot those Democrats and Republicans alike who voted for that tragic misadventure in Iraq.** Who didn't understand the difference between a Sunni and a Shia. Who didn't understand that militaries can stop a problem, they can never fix a problem. And they didn't understand that you better know how its going to end before you decide to use our military.'"
[**Contribute**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9439907/93194058/723115086?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmQ4ODQ1ZS1hNGM5LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2GCUR72PsFYo3X27AOdY9YqCGkVgJoE2s2yHnJ9hbEc=&refcode=em0828kimt)
**I want to serve Americans --_all _Americans -- as President because I want them to have someone they can trust and know is accountable only to them, above party, above self, above any special interest****. **
**Join me in our mission to unite America so we can once again meet the defining challenges of our time, by contributing to my campaign so all Americans can hear and believe in what America most needs today!**
[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9439908/93194059/1036341175?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmQ4ODQ1ZS1hNGM5LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2GCUR72PsFYo3X27AOdY9YqCGkVgJoE2s2yHnJ9hbEc=&refcode=em0828kimt)
Respectfully,
Joe Sestak
Come on board. We encourage you to [visit our website](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9439909/93194060/-209557350?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmQ4ODQ1ZS1hNGM5LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2GCUR72PsFYo3X27AOdY9YqCGkVgJoE2s2yHnJ9hbEc=)
and get involved in these challenging and wonderful times.

Alexandria, VA 22302

name: Laura Loomer
subject: "Your Travel has Been Restricted by Facebook"
body:
That could be the notice you get in the mail sometime in the future.
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-346195-800022-4628857-a45d53c779-87cde68bd2)
Patriot,

That could be the notice you get in the mail sometime in the future.

Months ago, I wrote about the Tech Giants secretly building a Chinses-Style "social credit system".

Just like your credit score monitors every financial move you make to assign a score, your "social credit score" will be compiled from your online actions – what you say, who you associate with, who you vote for, and, in the case of at least Twitter, your “off-line” actions as well.

While I’m already the creator of the #StopTheBias movement to end discrimination and censorship of Republicans on social media . . . **this is ONE THOUSAND TIMES WORSE**.

[**And it’s one of the reasons why I’m running for Congress with your support.**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-346195-800022-4628857-a45d53c779-87cde68bd2)

When I'm in Congress, I'll put an end to digital extermination.

The "social credit system" has already been implemented by the Chinese Government.

Our future may look like China’s OR WORSE very soon. Just imagine . . .

* Having a loan for a new car denied because your Facebook friend was recently arrested.

* Being informed that your child or grandchild has been rejected from attending a private school because the child’s father liked too many pro-gun memes on Twitter.

* Excitedly preparing to go on vacation when your airline reservation is cancelled because you commented on a Facebook post critical of the TSA.

* Your shock when you get a knock on the door from law enforcement because Siri overheard you jokingly say, “you’re killing me!” to your spouse.

* Now consider the personal humiliation you would face when – just like in China – your name, picture and address appeared on your town’s online “Black List”.

It may seem unbelievable that America would move to a Communist style social credit system . . . but here’s the dirty truth . . . **it’s already here**.

For the last decade, financial lenders, specifically those operating in “high risk lending” communities, have been experimenting with and using social media profiles of credit seekers to determine loan qualifications.

Seventy-five percent of employers in the United States use social media as part of their hiring process.

Facebook was one of the first to jump on board and patented a product that would give creditors backdoor access to social media profiles in order to assess a loan application.

America’s social credit system isn’t coming . . . **it’s already here**.

And I’m running for Congress so that the residents of Florida’s 21st district have their privacy respected – and Facebook, Twitter, Google and Apple don’t become our digital overlords that determine our worthiness in society.

[**Help me get to Washington in 2020 and support my campaign here.**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-346195-800022-4628857-a45d53c779-87cde68bd2)

Social Media Giants have worked for years to restrict our Freedom of Speech by silencing voices like mine that don’t fall in line with their socialist views.

But behind the scenes, they’re working just as hard to erode any privacy that still exists in the lives of Americans – even if it’s just a thought you explore with a Google search.

[**Help me get into Congress**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-346195-800022-4628857-a45d53c779-87cde68bd2) and let’s stop this madness.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

P.S. Several of the scenarios mentioned above have already happened. Swat teams have raided homes due to alerts by Apple’s Siri and Amazon’s Alexa. Loans have been denied because applicants associate with the “wrong” people online. **I even had my own online account with Chase Bank suspended because of my pro-Trump views.** The Chinese-Style "Social Credit System" is already in play in America – [**get me into Congress to help stop it**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-346195-800022-4628857-a45d53c779-87cde68bd2).

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.
---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-561017072-4395-346195-800022-84585d41bbe610b-87cde68bd2)

Just like your credit score monitors every financial move you make to assign a score, your "social credit score" will be compiled from your online actions – what you say, who you associate with, who you vote for, and, in the case of at least Twitter, your “off-line” actions as well. While I’m already the creator of the #StopTheBias movement to end discrimination and censorship of Republicans on social media . . . this is ONE THOUSAND TIMES WORSE. When I'm in Congress, I'll put an end to digital extermination. The "social credit system" has already been implemented by the Chinese Government. Our future may look like China’s OR WORSE very soon. Just imagine . . . Having a loan for a new car denied because your Facebook friend was recently arrested. Being informed that your child or grandchild has been rejected from attending a private school because the child’s father liked too many pro-gun memes on Twitter. Excitedly preparing to go on vacation when your airline reservation is cancelled because you commented on a Facebook post critical of the TSA. Your shock when you get a knock on the door from law enforcement because Siri overheard you jokingly say, “you’re killing me!” to your spouse. Now consider the personal humiliation you would face when – just like in China – your name, picture and address appeared on your town’s online “Black List”. It may seem unbelievable that America would move to a Communist style social credit system . . . but here’s the dirty truth . . . it’s already here. For the last decade, financial lenders, specifically those operating in “high risk lending” communities, have been experimenting with and using social media profiles of credit seekers to determine loan qualifications. Seventy-five percent of employers in the United States use social media as part of their hiring process. Facebook was one of the first to jump on board and patented a product that would give creditors backdoor access to social media profiles in order to assess a loan application. America’s social credit system isn’t coming . . . it’s already here. And I’m running for Congress so that the residents of Florida’s 21st district have their privacy respected – and Facebook, Twitter, Google and Apple don’t become our digital overlords that determine our worthiness in society. Social Media Giants have worked for years to restrict our Freedom of Speech by silencing voices like mine that don’t fall in line with their socialist views. But behind the scenes, they’re working just as hard to erode any privacy that still exists in the lives of Americans – even if it’s just a thought you explore with a Google search. and let’s stop this madness. Respectfully, Laura Loomer P.S. Several of the scenarios mentioned above have already happened. Swat teams have raided homes due to alerts by Apple’s Siri and Amazon’s Alexa. Loans have been denied because applicants associate with the “wrong” people online. I even had my own online account with Chase Bank suspended because of my pro-Trump views.** The Chinese-Style "Social Credit System" is already in play in America – . Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited. Laura Loomer for Congress Inc 720 Lucerne Ave, #1465 LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460

name: Michael
subject: Tate Reeves
body:
|

The results are in. The runoff in the Republican primary wrapped up last night, and we officially know who we're going up against this November. :
Friend,

The results are in. The runoff in the Republican primary wrapped up last night, and we officially know who we're going up against this November. We're facing off against Lieutenant Governor Tate Reeves, and we couldn't feel more ready.

**[Can you contribute now to help us get an early lead on Tate?](https://act.myngp.com/el/ai0VkeYryULTaFAUE84yfsuefbYg14yF4owqklV0F_M=/U5aGwBiDQqeQPYEF_Zh7Hy1B5lb3ESnF69lDjxrvkuA=?refcode=20190828nd&amount=10)**

We've been working hard over the past few months to get our message out to every corner of the state, and to show the people of Mississippi who Jim is and what he stands for. The reception has been strong, and we know we're ready for the general election.

The contrast between these two candidates couldn't be more clear: while Jim has stood up for working families and the people of Mississippi, Tate has defended out-of-state corporations and special interests. We have all eyes on November, and it's clear that we can win this.

**[We know we have an opponent that we can beat, but we'll need all the help we can get. Will you chip in now to help us come out on top?](https://act.myngp.com/el/ai0VkeYryULTaFAUE84yfsuefbYg14yF4owqklV0F_M=/U5aGwBiDQqeQPYEF_Zh7Hy1B5lb3ESnF69lDjxrvkuA=?refcode=20190828nd&amount=10)**

Thanks for all of your support. We feel confident that with you in our corner, we can beat Tate Reeves on Election Day.

Thanks,

Michael

| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ai0VkeYryULTaFAUE84yfsuefbYg14yF4owqklV0F_M=/U5aGwBiDQqeQPYEF_Zh7Hy1B5lb3ESnF69lDjxrvkuA=?refcode=20190828nd&amount=10)

|

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/ai0VkeYryULTaFAUE84yfsuefbYg14yF4owqklV0F_M=/-CPUm7m37Bn2RY0Gk1JSg5923g3AMQywb-MdmrrPKUc=). Friends of Jim Hood
P.O. Box 16647
Jackson MS 39236 United States

| Peter, it's officially here: **Today is the deadline to meet the DNC 's requirements for the next debate stage.**

Joe Biden, Cory Booker, Pete Buttigieg, Julián Castro, Kamala Harris, Amy Klobuchar, Beto O'Rourke, Bernie Sanders, Elizabeth Warren, and Andrew Yang have all qualified so far.

Billionaire and self-funder Tom Steyer is just one poll away from qualifying after spending an exorbitant $5 million on digital ads, and Tulsi Gabbard and Marianne Williamson have crossed 130,000 donors, too.

Today is the last day your donation can help us get closer to that requirement so I can join all of them on stage--I think we can get there, but we need a last surge of momentum from our supporters to do it.

You haven't donated to this campaign yet--maybe because you're undecided, maybe because it feels too early to donate to a candidate.

I have to tell you: It's okay to be undecided. But it's not too early to donate‚ because I really could be cut from the stage if more people don't step up.

And if I'm cut from the stage, essential conversations--on women and reproductive rights, on corruption in politics, and on families--don't happen. [**So will you make today the day you become a debate stage donor? Any amount, even $1, helps us meet the 130,000-donor threshold, but today is the last day your gift can count toward the DNC deadline.**](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjIwMTEwMjcS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTU2MTYxODA5NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

clean_body: I’m going to be honest with you. | | | | | | Goal Update: $243,837 left to hit our August end-of-month goal | I’m going to be honest with you, we’re behind and we don’t have much time left to hit our goal. And while many Democrats have spent years building their campaigns and networks, Andrew is an entrepreneur. He hasn’t been a politician for years and we’re building this campaign from the ground up. Can you rush a donation now so we can hit our goal by our August 31st deadline? We need every dollar you can afford to give if we’re going to make bold ideas like universal basic income a reality: | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | | Every contribution we bring in today will go directly to winning this election: hiring more organizers in the early primary states, running new targeted digital ads, and introducing Andrew and his optimistic vision for our country to the millions of voters who will decide this election. Friend, there are no corporate PACs or special interests who can close this budget gap for us, it’s just this grassroots team giving what they can. There’s something special in that --- and we could not do it without you. | Thank you for everything you’re doing, Carly Reilly Finance Director Yang2020 | ****Join the Yang Gang! If you'd like to volunteer to help with grassroots organizing, please fill out an organizer application and someone from our team will reach out. | | | Thank you for helping to make Universal Basic Income a reality. | | | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang | All rights reserved. New York, NY #HumanityFirst | No longer want to receive these emails? . Friends of Andrew Yang

name: Team Ed Markey
subject: While Trump embarrasses and disappoints us, it's up to us to take on the climate crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| Hello - It's embarrassing and extremely disappointing. President Trump didn't bother to show up at the G7 meeting on climate change.

It's up to all Americans to show that despite President Trump, we will not back down from the climate crisis.

_**[Will you add your name today and tell President Trump that you're in this fight?](http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dc13/693b8b0a/459e3f70/72de9f6e/1381391257/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/i-support-the-green-new-deal?source=082819_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")**_

Read more from Ed Markey:
* * *
**G7: Trump skips talks on climate crisis and Amazon fires**
Hello - When world leaders recently gathered to identify global solutions to to combat the climate crisis, President Donald Trump was nowhere to be seen.

Our climate-denier-in-chief couldn't even be bothered to show up for a meeting.

But while Trump and the GOP continue to bury their heads in the sand and deny climate change, we're mobilizing a grassroots movement to save our planet and grow our economy.

_**[SIGN ON: Tell President Trump that we will not back down from fighting climate change!](http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dc13/693b8b0a/459e3f70/72de9f6e/1381391257/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/i-support-the-green-new-deal?source=082819_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")**_

New polling shows that the American people support the Green New Deal.

> ➜ 63% of adults nationwide think the proposal is a good idea.
>
> ➜ 60% of registered voters support it.
>
> ➜ 86% of Democrats and 64% of Independents are in favor of the plan.
But Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell and President Trump are dug in and will do everything they can to stop the Green New Deal.

That's why we must turn up the pressure and show the GOP that we will not back down from this fight.

_**[Sign our petition and tell President Trump that you're in this fight to combat climate change!](http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dc13/693b8b0a/459e3f70/72de9f6e/1381391257/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/i-support-the-green-new-deal?source=082819_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")**_

Thanks,

Ed

clean_body: | | | Hello - It's embarrassing and extremely disappointing. President Trump didn't bother to show up at the G7 meeting on climate change. It's up to all Americans to show that despite President Trump, we will not back down from the climate crisis. "=" Read more from Ed Markey: G7: Trump skips talks on climate crisis and Amazon fires Hello - When world leaders recently gathered to identify global solutions to to combat the climate crisis, President Donald Trump was nowhere to be seen. Our climate-denier-in-chief couldn't even be bothered to show up for a meeting. But while Trump and the GOP continue to bury their heads in the sand and deny climate change, we're mobilizing a grassroots movement to save our planet and grow our economy. "=" New polling shows that the American people support the Green New Deal. ➜ 63% of adults nationwide think the proposal is a good idea. ➜ 60% of registered voters support it. ➜ 86% of Democrats and 64% of Independents are in favor of the plan. But Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell and President Trump are dug in and will do everything they can to stop the Green New Deal. That's why we must turn up the pressure and show the GOP that we will not back down from this fight. "="**_ Thanks, Ed | | Paid for by The Markey Committee Contributions or gifts to The Markey Committee are not tax deductible.

subject: BREAKING: GA is THE 2020 battleground
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
Friend,

Georgia just became THE premier battleground state in 2020.

This morning Senator Isakson announced his retirement, which means there isn’t just one but TWO U.S. Senate seats up for grabs.

The strength of our campaign will determine the Senate majority, but we’ll need to overcome Republican voter suppression that barely kept us from winning last year’s gubernatorial race to do it.

Can you chip in before our critical August deadline? We don’t take corporate PAC money – Teresa is counting on you to help us defeat
David Perdue and give Georgia real leadership in Washington.

Express Donate:
If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:
Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eom?refcode=em082819_2&noskip=true&amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode2=e111e7d4-bac9-e911-bcd0-281878391efb]

Your contributions keep Teresa on the road from Cairo to Roswell to Dalton talking to Democrats who are fired up to turn Georgia blue.

So much is hanging in the balance of this election – the Supreme Court, the Senate majority, and the bold action we need to address the climate emergency, income inequality, and the healthcare crisis brought on by GOP sabotage to the Affordable Care Act and restrictions on women’s reproductive freedom.

Rush a donation before our critical August deadline to take on David Perdue and win Georgia in 2020. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eom?refcode=em082819_2&refcode2=e111e7d4-bac9-e911-bcd0-281878391efb]

#
There are only a few days left until our August fundraising deadline. Our team is working around the clock to make sure we hit our goal, but we can’t do this without you.

[**Will you chip in right now?**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=f98493ef9a&e=02cd889ad3)

David ran for the US Senate to help change the direction of our country. He’s had a major impact in a very short amount of time by focusing on delivering results for Georgia and working with President Trump to help lead the greatest economic turnaround in modern history.

Now, we’re in for a tough fight. Radical Democrats see that David has delivered results, and they will do whatever it takes to defeat us in 2020. **I’m personally asking as many of our supporters to step up and give now so we can fight back.**

[**Will you give $10, $25 – or whatever you can afford – right now?**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=1863f24fc7&e=02cd889ad3)

We won in 2014 – despite the odds – because of supporters like you. You were there for us then, and we need you to be with us more than ever before right now.

I know we can hit this fundraising goal if every person who sees this email steps up. I know we can keep up the momentum and continue delivering results. I know we can win, but only if we stand strong together.

[**David is counting your help. Please, help us hit our goal for this deadline.**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=1418066dfe&e=02cd889ad3)

Thank you for everything!

Bonnie Perdue

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: Susan Collins is "sad" that her vote to confirm Brett Kavanaugh has cost her votes →
body:
Women's rights. Gerrymandering. Citizenship.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802de4/4bef7a87/683aa359/287f1448/3367072551/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

**Susan Collins is "sad" that her vote to confirm Brett Kavanaugh has cost her votes. She'll be even sadder when Sara Gideon defeats her and becomes Maine's next U.S. Senator.**
****[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802de4/4bef7a87/683aa359/287f144f/3367072551/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA4MjgtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-august-eom?refcode=em190828-full")****
Friends -
Susan Collins just told _Politico_ that she's "sad" her vote to confirm Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court has cost her votes.
Well Senator Collins, we're sad, too.
We're sad that Brett Kavanaugh voted against blocking a law that could make it more difficult for women to get abortions.
We're sad that you refused to listen to Mainers, even after they called on you to reject Kavanaugh.
Most of all, we're sad that you don't seem to trust women - women who spoke out against Kavanaugh.
Instead of regretting her vote for Brett Kavanaugh or apologizing for not listening to women, Susan Collins says she's "sad" about its impact on her chance of reelection. All she cares about is winning, so she can continue voting in line with Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump.
Well we're saying, it's time for her to go:
[**Can you make a $3 contribution to Sara Gideon 's campaign to defeat Susan Collins? Chip in before our end-of-month deadline hits this Saturday at midnight.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802de4/4bef7a87/683aa359/287f144f/3367072551/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA4MjgtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-august-eom?refcode=em190828-full")
Mainers deserve a Senator who puts their needs first - and our campaign is going to be the one to give it to them.
Are you with us?
\- Team Sara
****[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802de4/4bef7a87/683aa359/287f144f/3367072551/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA4MjgtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-august-eom?refcode=em190828-full")****

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802de4/4bef7a87/683aa359/287f144e/3367072551/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Well we're saying, it's time for her to go: "" Mainers deserve a Senator who puts their needs first - and our campaign is going to be the one to give it to them. Are you with us? \- Team Sara "" Sara Gideon for Maine PO Box 812 South Freeport, ME 04078

body:
We'll be featuring three congressmen and combat veterans front-and-center at the 2019 Team Holcomb Fall Dinner, and we'd like for you to meet them... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/meet-congressmen-combatveterans-crenshaw-mast-baird?e=1acd9bb3d6)

---
| **Fox News Interview:
Meet Congressmen & Combat Veterans Crenshaw, Mast & Baird**
We'll be featuring three congressmen and combat veterans front-and-center at the [2019 Team Holcomb Fall Dinner](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ec04fefce9&e=1acd9bb3d6), and we'd like for you to meet them.

[Click here to watch a Fox News interview](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=893d202b86&e=1acd9bb3d6) with Congressmen and combat veterans Dan Crenshaw, Brian Mast, and Jim Baird. They discuss their service to our country -- both in and out of uniform -- and everything they've sacrificed to help keep America free.

Indiana's own Jim Baird said it perfectly during the interview: "All veterans care about this country, in fact, I love this country."

These three men have served our country exceptionally and have given so much both on and off the battlefield. [RSVP now](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0702eb23a1&e=1acd9bb3d6), and learn more about these three combat veterans on October 14th at the [2](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1cfc2ee748&e=1acd9bb3d6)[019 Team Holcomb Fall Dinner](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b4980533e8&e=1acd9bb3d6)!

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Americans’ View of the Current Economy is the Highest in 19 Years
body:
Americans’ assessment of current economic conditions has climbed to the highest level in nearly two decades. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bd0932dddd&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Americans’ View of the Current Economy is the Highest in 19 Years**

Americans’ assessment of current economic conditions has climbed to the highest level in nearly two decades, buoyed by a strong job market, Reade Pickert reports for _Bloomberg._

Of course, with a majority of Americans approving of President Donald J. Trump’s handling of the economy, the left is trying to rewrite the story of a blue-collar and middle-class resurgence. Fortunately, the results on the ground keep proving them wrong.

“The reading shows hiring and income gains are keeping consumers upbeat . . . The level of confidence could allow for sustained household spending that remains a mainstay of the economy. The share of respondents who say jobs are currently plentiful jumped to 51.2%, the highest since September 2000.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c11c45a9fb&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| The [_Pittsburgh Post-Gazette_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a57bc76198&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board says that President Trump’s trade policies are looking out for the forgotten workers of America—not the media elites. “We are told that fighting the trade war just isn’t worth it. It makes Wall Street nervous. Maybe if your job and town are gone, the fight is worth it.”
---
|
---
| “Drone footage released by the Border Patrol over the weekend shows miles of a ‘new border wall system’ going up at a location in Arizona near where illegal immigrants were seen streaming into America years ago,” Greg Norman reports for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9edec82e8b&e=3ee4985eea). “Elsewhere in Arizona, crews were installing 30-foot steel fencing Friday to replace older barriers next to a border crossing known as Lukeville Port of Entry.”
---
|
---
| President Trump was elected by working-class citizens to rewrite America’s broken trade agreements. “One of those deals he vowed to rework was NAFTA, and he did it,” Agriculture Secretary Sonny Perdue writes in the [_Harold & Review_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=888c21c815&e=3ee4985eea). “USMCA includes rules which encourage vehicle and parts production in the United States and supports supply chains to use more United States products. USMCA also creates a new labor value content rule to drive higher wages for manufacturing jobs.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9b7c2dca63&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8e576e86ba&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=2d8b454659)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

body:
I mean every word I'm about to say: This election is our best shot in a decade to oust Mitch McConnell and flip the entire Senate for Democrats.
|
---

| | I just got the news:

Mitch McConnell is at risk of losing his seat after getting a challenge from Amy McGrath, a career public servant with national security experience just like me.

Democrats are closing in on his lead in the polls.

And here's the kicker: Fox News just admitted Moscow Mitch has the worst favorability in the Senate.

This election is our best shot in a decade to oust Mitch McConnell and flip the entire Senate for Democrats.

**But our chances plummet if we lose my race here in Colorado. Nate Silver, CNN, and MSNBC all agree it 's a must-win.**

I'm 65 gifts short of funding my next round of ads and outreach to win this campaign. Can you help me before my End of Month Deadline?

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

name: Addisu Demissie
subject: Let's reach every single voter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team, there are just over two weeks left until Cory will be in Houston for the third Democratic primary debate. [_**We need to have the resources to spread Cory 's message before the big day. Will you chip in $3 to our Debate Amplification Fund for efforts nationwide?**_](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190828-em1?refcode=em_fr_20190828_CB_20190828-fr-CB-eom4-ndnr2_ndnr2_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=3,10,20,35,50,100") I'm extremely excited for Cory to share his message with millions of Americans once again -- he crushed it last time -- but to be honest, we have a lot of work to do between now and then. Yes, we have to make sure Cory is ready for anything when he gets up on that stage. But we also need to amplify his message before, during, and after the big night. Here's why: We saw during last month's debate that when people hear from Cory directly, they like what they see. And with so many voters still undecided, it's essential we reach them all -- every single one -- so every American knows who Cory is and what he stands for. [_**So team, will you make a $3 donation today to support our Debate Amplification Fund? Anything you give will help us share Cory 's voice with voters across the country.**_](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190828-em1?refcode=em_fr_20190828_CB_20190828-fr-CB-eom4-ndnr2_ndnr2_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=3,10,20,35,50,100") Thanks for being on this team, Addisu Addisu Demissie
Campaign Manager
Cory 2020
[](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190828-em1?refcode=em_fr_20190828_CB_20190828-fr-CB-eom4-ndnr2_ndnr2_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=3,10,20,35,50,100")

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Tom Steyer + 10 others
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand 2020
body:
Time is running out before the DNC's deadline at midnight tonight.

| | [](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=MjIwMTUzNjgS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTU2MTY3MTM3NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
|
---
| Peter,

Self-funder and billionaire Tom Steyer is just one poll away from guaranteeing his spot in the fall debates after spending $12 million on ads in the past few weeks.

He could become the 11th candidate to secure a spot alongside Joe Biden, Cory Booker, Pete Buttigieg, Julián Castro, Kamala Harris, Amy Klobuchar, Beto O'Rourke, Bernie Sanders, Elizabeth Warren, and Andrew Yang.

We're still a few thousand donors away from helping guarantee my spot on that stage, and time is running out before the DNC's deadline at **_midnight tonight._**

[**Make a donation of any size right now to become one of the donors I need to hit the DNC 's 130,000-donor goal before the cutoff.**](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjIwMTUzNjgS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTU2MTY3MTM3NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

From the very beginning of this campaign, I've promised to be a voice for those whose voices have been ignored for too long.

On each debate stage so far, I've done that.

I've been the fiercest fighter for women and reproductive rights, and called out those who would see women's rights rolled back decades.

I spoke about white privilege and explained that if white people aren't helping dismantle institutional racism alongside people of color, we're not doing enough.

And I shared the urgency of our climate crisis, and detailed my plan to launch an international environmental "space race" with China to get us to a green future.

**It 's all this and more that I want to be able to talk about on the fall debate stages, too.**

---
Make a donation of any size today to help send me to the next round of debates:
| If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
---
| | [Donate $5](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjIwMTUzNjgS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTU2MTY3MTM3NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

---

---

---

| Thank you,

Kirsten
---

| | [DONATE NOW](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjIwMTUzNjgS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTU2MTY3MTM3NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Make a donation of any size today to help send me to the next round of debates: | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you, Kirsten | | | DEADLINE: Less than 13 hours to go | | Paid for by Gillibrand 2020 | Contributions or gifts to Gillibrand 2020 are not tax-deductible. Gillibrand 2020 does not accept contributions from federal lobbyists, corporate and/or trade association PACs, or "for profit" business entities, including but not limited to sole proprietorships, partnerships, and LLCs.

name: Francis Conole
subject: The good and bad news:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conole for Congress
body:
| [](conoleforcongress.com)
---

| | I have both good and bad news.

**Here is the good news:** Our grassroots mission is gaining momentum throughout NY-24!

**But, here is the bad news:** Because of our growing campaign, GOP super PACs are already targeting us.

Republicans know I have a chance to beat their special interest rubber stamp, Congressman Katko -- so they'll only escalate their attacks in the coming months. We must be prepared to fight back.

[**We need to raise $10,000 for our Fight Back Fund before the end of August so we can be prepared for the GOP 's attacks. Will you chip in right now?**](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-superpac?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=1+-+We+need+to+raise+10000+for+our+Fight+Bac&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190828_1_1&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190828_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190828_1_1") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below. Otherwise, you will be redirected to a donation page._ | [$5](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-superpac?amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=2+-+5&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190828_1_1&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190828_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190828_1_1") | [$20](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-superpac?amount=20&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=3+-+20&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190828_1_1&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190828_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190828_1_1") | [$50](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-superpac?amount=50&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=4+-+50&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190828_1_1&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190828_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190828_1_1")
---|---|---
[$100](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-superpac?amount=100&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=5+-+100&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190828_1_1&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190828_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190828_1_1") | [$250](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-superpac?amount=250&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=6+-+250&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190828_1_1&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190828_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190828_1_1") | [Other](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-superpac?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=7+-+Other&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190828_1_1&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190828_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190828_1_1")
Unlike Katko and his GOP allies, we're not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. We know they're threatened by our all people, no corporate PACs-mission.

**[So, will you contribute before Saturday's deadline to help us fight the right-wing attacks?](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-superpac?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=8+-+FIRSTNAMESo+will+you+contribute+before+S&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190828_1_1&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190828_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190828_1_1")

[https://go.conoleforcongress.com/superpac-attack](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-superpac?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=9+-+httpsgoconoleforcongresscomsuperpacattac&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190828_1_1&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190828_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190828_1_1")**

I really appreciate you being a part of our team.

Yours in service,

Francis

|
---

_This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Francis Conole is running to represent New York 's 24th Congressional District to bring fresh leadership to Central NY. A fourth-generation Syracusan and Iraq War veteran, he has dedicated his life to service and sacrifice. You can learn more about his mission by liking us on **[Facebook](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b1e1/388db0e9/804722d/609ae26b/2221561747/VEsHBQ/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://www.facebook.com/conole4congress/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=10+-+Facebook&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190828_1_1&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190828_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190828_1_1")** and following us on **[Twitter](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b1e1/388db0e9/804722d/609ae26a/2221561747/VEsHBA/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://twitter.com/Conole4Congress?lang=en&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=11+-+Twitter&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190828_1_1&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190828_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190828_1_1")**. **[Click here to contribute to our campaign.](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-footer?refcode=footer&amount=15&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=12+-+Click+here+to+contribute+to+our+campaign&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190828_1_1&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190828_1_1")**

We're relying on grassroots supporters like you. But, if you wish to no longer receive emails from us, you can **[unsubscribe here.](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b1e1/388db0e9/804722d/609ae268/2221561747/VEsHBg/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://conole.bsd.net/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=13+-+unsubscribe+here&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190828_1_1&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190828_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190828_1_1")** Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense._

name: Dr. Michael Mann (via 314 Action)
subject: This climate scientist is endorsing Hickenlooper for Senate [Will you join him?]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, [www
body:
A personal message from Dr. Michael Mann, climate scientist and recipient of the 2019 Tyler Prize for Environmental Achievement:
---
| | [](https://secure.314action.?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_hickannounce_hic?refcode=314_EM_FR_190828_HicMann_U3_X3&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190828_HicMann_U3_X3&source=314_EM_FR_190828_HicMann_U3_X3") Friends -- I've spent my career sounding the alarm on climate change and the Republican effort to obstruct climate action. And today, I'm proud to endorse John Hickenlooper for U.S. Senate in Colorado. But the first week of any campaign is critical to its success -- That's why a group of generous donors has agreed to **TRIPLE MATCH** all donations to help John Hickenlooper's campaign for Senate by the end of the day. [**Hick 's not taking a dime of corporate PAC money -- He's relying on us. Can I count on you to make a triple matched contribution to help Hick's campaign for Senate before the clock runs out? >>**](https://secure.314action.?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_hickannounce_hic?refcode=314_EM_FR_190828_HicMann_U3_X3&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+Hickrsquos+not+taking+a+dime+of+corporat&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190828_HicMann_U3_X3&source=314_EM_FR_190828_HicMann_U3_X3") | | | [Chip in $25 (x3)](https://secure.314action.?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_hickannounce_hic?refcode=314_EM_FR_190828_HicMann_U3_X3&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+Chip+in+25+x3&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190828_HicMann_U3_X3&source=314_EM_FR_190828_HicMann_U3_X3")

---
As a scientist, Hick's serious about addressing climate change -- He's also the **ONLY CHANCE** we have at unseating Cory Gardner, flipping the Senate, and removing climate-obstructionist Mitch McConnell from power.
Climate change denial isn't due to a lack of understanding. **It 's an orchestrated campaign being waged by the fossil fuel industry, Donald Trump, and his allies -- like Cory Gardner who votes with Trump nearly 90% of the time.**
As Governor of Colorado, Hickenlooper passed the first methane regulations in the country and led efforts to ensure that Colorado will meet or exceed Paris Agreement targets.
With Hick in the Senate, we'll be one step closer to dealing with our climate crisis and putting fact and reason above partisan politics. [**Please join me in helping John Hickenlooper 's campaign for U.S. Senate by making a triple matched contribution of $25, $10, or whatever you can today >>**](https://secure.314action.?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_hickannounce_hic?refcode=314_EM_FR_190828_HicMann_U3_X3&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=9+-+Please+join+me+in+helping+John+Hickenloo&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190828_HicMann_U3_X3&source=314_EM_FR_190828_HicMann_U3_X3")

| Stand with John Hickenlooper for Senate is a project of 314 Action, a grassroots community of nearly 1 million scientists and pro-science advocates working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.
---

clean_body: A personal message from Dr. Michael Mann, climate scientist and recipient of the 2019 Tyler Prize for Environmental Achievement: | | "" Friends -- I've spent my career sounding the alarm on climate change and the Republican effort to obstruct climate action. And today, I'm proud to endorse John Hickenlooper for U.S. Senate in Colorado. But the first week of any campaign is critical to its success -- That's why a group of generous donors has agreed to TRIPLE MATCH all donations to help John Hickenlooper's campaign for Senate by the end of the day. "" | | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" As a scientist, Hick's serious about addressing climate change -- He's also the ONLY CHANCE we have at unseating Cory Gardner, flipping the Senate, and removing climate-obstructionist Mitch McConnell from power. Climate change denial isn't due to a lack of understanding. It 's an orchestrated campaign being waged by the fossil fuel industry, Donald Trump, and his allies -- like Cory Gardner who votes with Trump nearly 90% of the time. As Governor of Colorado, Hickenlooper passed the first methane regulations in the country and led efforts to ensure that Colorado will meet or exceed Paris Agreement targets. With Hick in the Senate, we'll be one step closer to dealing with our climate crisis and putting fact and reason above partisan politics. "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" Thank you, Dr. Michael Mann | "" | Stand with John Hickenlooper for Senate is a project of 314 Action, a grassroots community of nearly 1 million scientists and pro-science advocates working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country. If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can "" We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can "" If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, "" | Paid for by 314 Action Fund, "", not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee.

name: Team Beto
subject: An overwhelming response
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
This is a strong start -- but we can do even better. In fact, we plan to spread the word far and wide about Beto’s sweeping new platform.
#
This is amazing --
A few days ago, we reached out to collect signatures in support of Beto’s plan to combat gun violence.
Since then, **the response has been overwhelming** \-- thousands of you have already signed on.
This is a strong start -- but we can do even better. In fact, we plan to spread the word far and wide about Beto’s sweeping new platform.
[To do that, we need your help -- will you give $3 so we can educate even more voters about Beto’s gun violence plan?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/30255?refcode=ema20190828-51703&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=51703%2E444211%2EyvPx_J)
**[Give $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/30255?refcode=ema20190828-51703&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=51703%2E444211%2EyvPx_J)**
At a time when 40,000 people a year are dying from gun violence, and when hate crimes have been on the rise for three straight years, we need bold action.
As president, Beto will take bold action. But, to get him elected, **we need your help**.
[Will you chip in $3 (or whatever you can) so we can spread the word about -- and build more support for -- Beto’s sweeping new plan?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/30255?refcode=ema20190828-51703&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=51703%2E444211%2EyvPx_J)
Thank you for your support. Together, we will lead the fight against hatred and gun violence in this country.
\- Team Beto
**[Donate](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/30255?refcode=ema20190828-51703&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=51703%2E444211%2EyvPx_J)**

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=51703%2E444211%2EyvPx_J). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

body:

Did you catch Tim on **_Hardball_** last night team?

He sat down with Chris Matthews to discuss the opioid crisis that is ravaging communities across America.

**" These companies get away with murder, for decades, and we're left holding the bag. Whether you're wealthy, or poor, or middle class, everyone has been touched this."
_-Tim on Hardball_**
The opioid crisis costs us close to **$45 BILLION** a year, and our most depressed communities are hit hardest. Tim is fighting every day to bring these issues in front of the American people, so we can finally solve the crisis and heal our broken communities.

**[Tim only has one more day to qualify for the next debate. Contribute today so our forgotten communities have a voice on the stage in Houston.](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-septdebate?&amount=3&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+Tim+only+has+one+more+day+to+qualify+for&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190828_1_1&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190828_1_1&refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190828_1_1") **
