name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: 15,000 paper butterflies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d5c2/6cd27893/510c5b95/1580f5af/1286462513/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | While we're going about our lives, 15,000 migrant children were being jailed by Donald Trump as of last December. Two girls in California, Kaia and Lily, heard that number and decided to take action to raise awareness about each and every one of those children. **Kaia and Lily's idea? Painstakingly craft 15,000 paper butterflies, each one representing an individual migrant child.** [****](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d5c2/6cd27893/510c5b95/1580f5ac/1286462513/VEsE/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.facebook.com/JeffMerkleyOregon/photos/a.496707370348359/2843839882301751") To Kaia, Lily, and their friends, butterflies mean migration and freedom to move. They see how thousands of migrant children are being cruelly detained, and they want to make sure each and every one of us _also_ sees it. **It's their very own Butterfly Effect: with the simple act of creation, these girls hope to make a difference that will shake our country to its core.** [**Let's help these brave girls along: join me on Facebook, share their story, and let's grow a movement that won't rest until Donald Trump's child prisons are closed and every person coming to our nation is treated with dignity and respect.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d5c2/6cd27893/510c5b95/1580f5ac/1286462513/VEsF/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.facebook.com/JeffMerkleyOregon/photos/a.496707370348359/2843839882301751") So many lives hang in the balance. We can't sit on the sidelines and hope for the best. It's time to step up, and to let each and every person know that this is happening in our country and that it has to stop. **_Jeff_** Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d5c2/6cd27893/510c5b95/1580f5ad/1286462513/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjUifQ==/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2019-08-28-butterflyproject&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d5c2/6cd27893/510c5b95/1580f5aa/1286462513/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjE1In0=/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2019-08-28-butterflyproject&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$25](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d5c2/6cd27893/510c5b95/1580f5ab/1286462513/VEsA/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2019-08-28-butterflyproject&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d5c2/6cd27893/510c5b95/1580f5a8/1286462513/VEsB/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0=/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2019-08-28-butterflyproject&refcode2=express-buttons")

body:
We just checked in on our ActBlue progress, and not enough Democrats are stepping up to stand with Ed! | | |
No no no, team. We just checked our ActBlue progress, and not enough Democrats are stepping up to stand with Ed!

[](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-august2019-weekly?refcode=EM-082719_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
_**[Help Ed reach our $10,000 goal by donating $27 or more before midnight!](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-august2019-weekly?refcode=EM-082719_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_
If we don't reach our goal this week, we could risk falling out of the fight against President Trump's dangerous agenda.

**Ed is a thorn in President Trump 's side.**

When President Trump's extremist FCC chair threw out net neutrality rules, Ed fought back by leading the charge to pass legislation in the Senate to restore a free and open internet.

When President Trump pulled out of the Paris climate agreement, Ed knew we needed a Green New Deal resolution to fuel a movement to combat the climate crisis.

And when the Trump administration decided to sell weapons to Saudi Arabia without Congressional review, Ed was among the first to stand up and denounce President Trump for selling out America's moral leadership around the world.

From day one of Donald Trump's presidency, Americans have rallied behind Democratic champions who are standing up to Trump's dangerous agenda.

_**[And that's exactly what Ed is doing every day. Will you stand with Ed today and pitch in $27 or more to help us reach our goal?](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-august2019-weekly?refcode=EM-082719_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

subject: Our President is Under Attack
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Patriot,
Our President is under constant attack from the radical left, the liberal elites of Silicon Valley and the LameStream fake news media. As our President's biggest supporter, I will not stand by and watch the Democrats tear down the President of the United States.
A few things to note about the current state of the radical left:
* The top Democrats across the country continue to use President Trump as their own personal punching bag.
* Google manipulated votes for Hillary in the 2016 elections.
* The LameStream fake news media will run with whatever negative headline they can about our President in an attempt to bolster their horrible ratings.

With everything stacked against him, it's a miracle President Trump won in 2016 and is able to accomplish so much in his first term. However, if he is going to win again he needs our help to get him across the finish line in 2020. Will you join me on this fight to defend our President?

| | Derek,

Underwood Jacobs currently serves as the regional Senior Vice President of California Bank and Trust, where she helps Californians live their _American Dream_ – purchase their first home, receive a loan to launch a small business, or save for retirement. name: Greg Stanton
subject: a resounding victory in Phoenix
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Yesterday, voters in Phoenix turned out to resoundingly defeat two dark money-backed ballot initiatives that would have defunded our community's public transit, parks, libraries, and senior services.

We won this race by getting new voters to the polls, running on a positive message, and fighting back against dark money lies.

The playbook is clear -- this is how we will deliver more wins for Arizona in 2020.

_But it will take lots of resources to execute this playbook statewide to drive record turn out in next year 's critical election! _

[**Will you quick chip in a few bucks to my 2020 Turn-Out-The-Vote Fund to help us win in Arizona in 2020?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/kozFNOHjmxUzXlc8LKjznuTL-eIrCC1sRShIKIwTmm8=/Qi5Cma_X7bYRapyZisVhX3ef5vX-R5GuP8GvfFxUR-Y=?refcode=X_082819_EOM_A&amount=3&recurring=auto)

It's amazing to see the groundswell of grassroots support for Andy and Jacqueline. _This is how we** _win_**._

Matt Bevin can pour millions of his own fortune into this campaign and he's backed by big national donors who can flood this race with outside money. That's why it's so important our fundraising stays on track.

subject: McConnell SCREWED

body:

My friend Ben Ray is up against his critical end-of-month deadline in 72 hours. If we want to defeat McConnell's Senate, we MUST give all our money to Ben Ray! ALL OF IT! Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4d2/18e32a7f/523be1f2/7bd64795/3988820133/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4d2/18e32a7f/523be1f2/7bd6478a/3988820133/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4d2/18e32a7f/523be1f2/7bd64788/3988820133/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben

Albuquerque, NM 87125

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Straight out of the gate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
Together, we all came together and said: We're fed up with Cory Gardner and Mitch McConnell playing political games on the issues that matter most for Colorado and our country. Now, it's time to turn | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714e3/691c9bd/6e512e48/11a7bb5b/2459851030/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-aug?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend: Thanks to this team, this campaign got off to a _great_ start last week--and I'm so grateful.

We all came together and said: We're fed up with Cory Gardner and Mitch McConnell playing political games on the issues that matter most for Colorado and our country.

**Now, it 's time to turn up the volume on that message.**

Saturday is the first monthly fundraising deadline of this campaign, and what we can raise will go a long way toward deciding how (and how big) we build this grassroots operation.

Unlike our opponent, Cory Gardner, we're not taking a dime from corporate PACs--we're counting entirely on people like you. [**_Will you chip in today to help finish our first month in as strong a place as possible?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-aug?refcode=em_fr_20190828_JH_20190828-fr-JH-EOM1-all_all_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

Thank you,
John [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-aug?refcode=em_fr_20190828_JH_20190828-fr-JH-EOM1-all_all_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---

P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper for Colorado team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714e3/691c9bd/6e512e48/11a7bb56/2459851030/VEsC/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714e3/691c9bd/6e512e48/11a7bb57/2459851030/VEsD/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714e3/691c9bd/6e512e48/11a7bb54/2459851030/VEsA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714e3/691c9bd/6e512e48/11a7bb55/2459851030/VEsB/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714e3/691c9bd/6e512e48/11a7bb52/2459851030/VEsO/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. But if at any point you'd like to stop receiving these messages, you can unsubscribe [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714e3/691c9bd/6e512e48/11a7bb53/2459851030/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please update your information [_**here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714e3/691c9bd/6e512e48/11a7bb56/2459851030/VEsHBQ/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer").

name: Team Beto
subject: An incredibly ambitious goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
This is how we’re going to win: with an outpouring of support and generosity from grassroots supporters like you.
#
_This_ is how we’re going to win.
After Beto took two weeks away from the campaign earlier this month to be with El Paso in the healing process, we knew we were going to have to work hard to catch up.
To get things back on track, we set an incredibly ambitious goal before the end of the month. And we’ve made amazing progress, all thanks to our grassroots community stepping up.
However, while we’re very close, we’re still short of where we need to be. [Can you give $3 to help us close the gap and reach our goal before the month ends?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/30324?refcode=ema20190828-51752&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=51752%2E444211%2ErhBjo6)
**[Contribute $3 »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/30324?refcode=ema20190828-51752&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=51752%2E444211%2ErhBjo6)**
_This_ is how we’re going to win: with an outpouring of support and generosity from grassroots supporters like you.
Thanks to people giving generously, we were able to put our organizers back out in the field, re-launch our ad campaigns, and return to making calls and knocking on doors.
Hitting this goal means we will be able to go even further -- it means we can recruit more organizers, run ads to more potential supporters, and talk to even more voters in early primary and caucus states.
But the end of the month is right around the corner, so time is running out for us to reach our goal. [Please give $3 (or more) to help us make sure we can keep campaigning this hard as we go into September. ](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/30324?refcode=ema20190828-51752&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=51752%2E444211%2ErhBjo6)
Together, we can win this. We _will_ win this.
Thanks,
-Team Beto

name: Cory Booker
subject: I want to hear directly from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| I know it's hard to believe, but it's already time to start preparing for the next DNC debate -- and I need your help. **Friend, time is running out, and I want to hear from you.[Can you take two minutes to fill out my debate stage priority survey? This is the most effective way to have your thoughts shared directly with me and our campaign.](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/september-debate-survey?source=em_su_20190828_CB_20190828-su-CB-debateprep-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** [](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/september-debate-survey?source=em_su_20190828_CB_20190828-su-CB-debateprep-actives_actives_button1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") I've been on the trail for over six months -- talking to folks all across the country about what matters to them, hearing stories and ideas, and bringing their priorities to the forefront of this campaign. I've heard from people about the need to confront the existential threat of climate change and how we're going to address it as a country. And I've heard how we must combat white supremacy, implement gun violence prevention reforms, and stand up for reproductive rights. **[But this is only the start. The September debate stage will be finalized tonight at midnight, and I want to hear directly from you. What issues do you most want to hear about in the next debate?](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/september-debate-survey?source=em_su_20190828_CB_20190828-su-CB-debateprep-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** One of the founding principles of this grassroots campaign is that everyone deserves to have their voice heard. And that includes you. When I step onto that stage in a few weeks, I want to be ready -- and with your help, I will be. Thank you for your help,
Cory [](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/september-debate-survey?source=em_su_20190828_CB_20190828-su-CB-debateprep-actives_actives_button2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b62/5fca0d19/73fa5408/29195639/536339715/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b62/5fca0d19/73fa5408/29195638/536339715/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b62/5fca0d19/73fa5408/29195607/536339715/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b62/5fca0d19/73fa5408/29195606/536339715/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b62/5fca0d19/73fa5408/29195605/536339715/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0b62/5fca0d19/73fa5408/29195639/536339715/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

subject: Video of the day: ‘The Wall is going up very fast’
body:
Today, President Trump shared a short, aerial video of wall construction along America’s southern border | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b7e7525825&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • August 28, 2019
---
| | |
# **Update: Take precautions as Hurricane Dorian moves toward U.S.**

**This afternoon,** Hurricane Dorian was officially upgraded from a tropical storm to a Category 1 hurricane. President Donald J. Trump and his Administration urge all Americans in the storm’s expected pathway to take precautions.

**“[Hurricane]-force winds** from #Dorian could begin in parts of Florida *as early as* Saturday or Saturday night,” the National Hurricane Center tweeted today. “Now is the time to begin thinking about what kinds of preparations you might need to make over the next couple of days.”

**Before the storm** reaches the U.S. mainland, it will affect residents of the U.S. Virgin Islands and Puerto Rico. The Federal Emergency Management Agency shared resources today for [real-time alerts](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3d4f8030c5&e=3ee4985eea) and other emergency updates for people in these communities.

**Please follow** [**@FEMA**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0bc751218f&e=3ee4985eea), [**@NWS**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=436e59d873&e=3ee4985eea), or [**@Readygov**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8b77ffdbde&e=3ee4985eea) on Twitter for live updates. For more information and resources, visit **[www.ready.gov/hurricanes](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=03029961a2&e=3ee4985eea). **
---
|
---
|
## **Video of the day: ‘The Wall is going up very fast’**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b6935cda4f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **Today,** President Trump shared an aerial video of wall construction along America’s southern border. The new, slatted barrier provides superior protection without unduly disrupting the incredible scenery of the American Southwest.

**“The Wall** is going up very fast despite total Obstruction by Democrats in Congress, and elsewhere!” the President wrote.
---
|
---
|
# **President Trump ends a driving force behind mass illegal immigration**

**“How do you stop** the torrent of kids risking their lives and coming to America illegally?” the _New York Post_ editorial board asked recently. “One key way: by finally fixing the Flores agreement, as President Trump hopes to do.”

**Last week,** the President unveiled a new plan that does exactly that.

**Going forward** , new standards will be implemented that ensure apprehended alien families can be held together during their immigration proceedings. This new rule will keep children safe, secure, and well cared-for while in U.S. custody. At the same time, it will help end the practice of exploiting children as tickets to enter America illegally.

**The _Flores_ Settlement Agreement, **along with a string of related activist court rulings, has forced our Government to release most illegal immigrant families—including fake families posed by smugglers to game the system—into the United States after just 20 days in custody. It is among the most glaring loopholes used to circumvent America’s legal immigration system. Democrats in Congress have repeatedly declined to fix it, so the Trump Administration is taking action to address this cause of our border crisis.

**Loopholes such as _Flores_ **are a magnet for smugglers that unleash lawlessness and chaos on America’s doorstep. For context, the number of family units apprehended at the southern border has skyrocketed in recent years—from just 14,855 in fiscal year 2013 to 432,838 so far this year.

**That’s an increase** of more than _2,800 percent_.

**Every bit as important,** by closing this loophole, President Trump is taking real action to destroy horrific child smuggling operations. For too long, the _Flores_ agreement has allowed children—some “bought” or stolen from their families by criminal organizations—to be used as pawns to bring large groups of illegal aliens into the United States.

**The bottom line:** “Ending the settlement was the right call,” John Daniel Davidson writes in [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1603a63634&e=3ee4985eea). “More than any other single policy, it has created a magnet for illegal immigration, essentially guaranteeing entry to unaccompanied minors and any adult who crosses the Rio Grande with a child.”

**Every single American** should want immigrants to enter our country legally, safely, and fairly. Only politicians who want open borders would oppose such an obvious fix.

[President Trump is enforcing the law AND keeping families together at the border.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d7fc69a012&e=3ee4985eea)****
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead
| **The President and First Lady walk to Air Force One after arriving at Bordeaux-Merignac Airport in France, en route to Washington, D.C.** | August 26, 2019
---

name: BREAKING NEWS (via Weld2020.org)
subject: President Trump wants officials to break the law so he can have his border wall built by election day.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|
---
[](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21uF6k4eqf2zBvwZUYjk6-hRqkeppOf4jcemetErYOC-MIHwpGyJuz3kEyC8ANeARzgDYMQxz3AYhGpzeQAurxL&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190828_fr&n=1) Friend — we always knew President Trump liked to play fast and loose with the rules, but his latest antics are going to be a **_total disaster_** for our legal system. According to the _Washington Post_ , President Trump is encouraging his aides to break the law in order to get his border wall built. When they balked, Trump upped the stakes, going so far as offering to **PARDON** anyone who is later charged with a crime because they followed POTUS’ orders. Here’s what the _Post_ said: “When aides have suggested that **some orders are illegal** or unworkable, **Trump has suggested he would pardon** the officials if they would **just go ahead** , aides said. He has waved off worries about contracting procedures and the use of eminent domain, saying **“take the land,”** according to officials who attended the meetings.” - Washington Post 8/27/19 **Let that sink in.** President Trump is so desperate to fulfill one of his campaign promises that he’s asking folks who work for OUR government to _break the law, take people’s land, and build a wall that won’t solve a damn thing._ **This kind of behavior is unacceptable and unbecoming of someone who holds the highest office in the land** , and it’s another reason why we NEED to beat Donald Trump in 2020. We cannot — and we should not — have a president who asks his staff to violate the law. _Our country deserves better_. We’re working hard every day to make sure Donald Trump is a one term president, and with you in our corner we know we can make it happen. Thanks for being a part of our team,
Team Weld | | [DONATE ➞](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21uF6k4eqf2zBvwZUYjk6-hRqkeppOf4jcemetErYOC-MIHwpGyJuz3kEyC8ANeARzgDYMQxz3AYhGpzeQAurxL&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190828_fr&n=2)
---

You can also keep up with Team Weld on [Twitter](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEee0J3CzZBj8v0TKy2tYMM&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190828_fr&n=4) or [Facebook](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sD5mbawGI5P2loKSMnHaUPJQdagn1SdGMQUy6UvfZqO&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190828_fr&n=5).

name: Team Fair Fight
subject: BREAKING: Two U.S. Senate seats are on the ballot in Georgia next November
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight
body:
These races could very well decide the fate of majority control in the U.S. Senate in the next Congress. |
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa50a/34a064cc/18b91c29/7031da9/4273185413/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | | Friend - Today, Senator Johnny Isakson announced that he will resign from the United States Senate at the end of this year to focus on his health. Senator Isakson has served the people of Georgia and the people of our country for decades, and our thoughts are with him and his family during this difficult time. Senator Isakson's resignation means that Georgia voters will head to the polls next November to vote on not one, but two United States Senate races. These races could very well decide the fate of majority control in the U.S. Senate in the next Congress. Combined with Georgia's 16 electoral college votes, key competitive congressional races, and control of the state house at stake, this news confirms what we've known all along: Georgia is a critical battleground state for 2020. **With so much on the line next year, we need to get to work now to ensure that every eligible voter can access the ballot and have their vote fairly counted so that the people 's voice can be heard. ** **[Will you chip in today to help us build the most robust voter protection force that Georgia has ever seen?](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa50a/34a064cc/18b91c29/7031db6/4273185413/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-2019?refcode=IE082819SEN")** In the face of roadblocks to the polls, we must work to protect our right to vote now more than ever. We must support and vote for leaders who will expand access to the ballot, not restrict it. Friend, this is the fight of a generation, and it's on us to see it to victory. Fighting back against voter suppression isn't easy, and it may not always feel glamorous. But expanding access to the ballot and ensuring free, fair elections are critical for our democracy and could very well determine the makeup of the United States Senate next year. To win in Georgia and across the country, we need to invest early and build strong voter protection teams that can anticipate and address problems before it's too late. Help us get there,
Team Fair Fight **[DONATE](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa50a/34a064cc/18b91c29/7031db6/4273185413/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-2019?refcode=IE082819SEN")**

clean_body: These races could very well decide the fate of majority control in the U.S. Senate in the next Congress. | "" | | | Friend - Today, Senator Johnny Isakson announced that he will resign from the United States Senate at the end of this year to focus on his health. Senator Isakson has served the people of Georgia and the people of our country for decades, and our thoughts are with him and his family during this difficult time. Senator Isakson's resignation means that Georgia voters will head to the polls next November to vote on not one, but two United States Senate races. These races could very well decide the fate of majority control in the U.S. Senate in the next Congress. Combined with Georgia's 16 electoral college votes, key competitive congressional races, and control of the state house at stake, this news confirms what we've known all along: Georgia is a critical battleground state for 2020. With so much on the line next year, we need to get to work now to ensure that every eligible voter can access the ballot and have their vote fairly counted so that the people 's voice can be heard. "" In the face of roadblocks to the polls, we must work to protect our right to vote now more than ever. We must support and vote for leaders who will expand access to the ballot, not restrict it. Friend, this is the fight of a generation, and it's on us to see it to victory. Fighting back against voter suppression isn't easy, and it may not always feel glamorous. But expanding access to the ballot and ensuring free, fair elections are critical for our democracy and could very well determine the makeup of the United States Senate next year. To win in Georgia and across the country, we need to invest early and build strong voter protection teams that can anticipate and address problems before it's too late. Help us get there, Team Fair Fight "" | "" "" "" 1270 Caroline Street Suite D120-311 Atlanta, GA 30307 (C)2018 Fair Fight, All rights reserved Contributions to Fair Fight are not tax-deductible. "" | | Paid for by Fair Fight

| Hi Peter,

I wanted you to hear directly from me: After more than 8 incredible months, I am ending my campaign for president of the United States.

I know this isn't the result that we wanted. We got into this race to win. But I think that it's important to know when it's not your time, and to know how you can best serve your community and country.

I believe I can best serve by helping unite our party--and our country--to beat Donald Trump and flip the Senate in 2020. So for the next 15 months, that's what I'm going to throw all of my energy into.

**First and foremost: I want to thank you, from the bottom of my heart, for everything that you 've done with this campaign.** Thank you for volunteering, donating, endorsing, and committing to caucus and vote with us. Thank you for sharing your stories with me. Thank you for inspiring me and joining me in this fight for our future.

**I am so proud of this team and everything that we have achieved.**

Together, we have built something historic. We've taken on the fights others wouldn't. We've led the fights that we can't afford to lose--and moved the entire field along with us.

We have put the civil rights of women front and center, and never backed down when it comes to valuing them. At a time when reproductive rights are at greater risk than ever, and when other leaders have been willing to make political deals on the backs of women, we've said loud and clear that women's rights are nonnegotiable.

We have moved the needle on fighting for families and their economic security--bringing issues like paid family leave from the back-burner to the presidential debate. We've fought for the principle that America can't succeed unless families do, and shown what a family-first policy agenda actually looks like.

We have shown this country a real plan to combat political corruption, so that we can truly break through Washington dysfunction and enact all of the progressive ideas we've been discussing in this primary. Only by taking on money in politics can we solve some of the biggest problems facing our children's futures, like gun violence and global climate change.

And of course, we've had a lot of fun along the way--sledding in New Hampshire, dressing up with drag queens in Iowa, drinking local beers and whiskey, marching in parades, and a whole lot of dancing.

**There is no team I 'd rather do it with than this one.**

I've met some of the bravest, most inspiring people all across this country, and I'm so proud of every person who's raised their voice to fight for our values.

Our work isn't done--not by a long shot. And we have a clear mission in front of us: We have to defeat President Trump, flip the Senate, and elect women up and down the ballot. It's the only way we can repair our moral fabric and protect everything we care about.

I can't wait to keep linking arms, marching, and fighting with you. **And I know that together, we will win this fight --because I still believe that Brave Wins.**

Thank you so much for everything.

See you soon,

Kirsten
---
